SHAMBALA
ENGINEERING
CAMPUS
MONGOLIA  ·  2020 — 2056  ·  GOBI RESTORATION

The world's first Gobi Desert engineering campus — combining smart irrigation, solar energy, and NASA satellite monitoring to halt desertification in Mongolia. 3 Land Arts, 166,857 trees.

MONGOLZ
Work Sequence

16-STEP SEQUENCE

Full pipeline from water survey to satellite monitoring

01
Hydrological Survey
Underground water source mapping and flow rate analysis across the site perimeter
02
Soil Analysis
Salinity, pH and nutrient composition testing for Ulmus Pumila root-zone suitability
03
Site Mapping
GPS boundary survey and topographic grid layout for three planting zone Land Arts
04
Climate Assessment
Wind corridor, frost calendar and solar irradiance profiling for Dornogovi Province
05
Irrigation Design
18,000 m LoRa-networked drip pipe layout and pressure zone calculation across three Land Arts
06
Solar Grid Planning
35 kWt panel array positioning optimised for peak Gobi Desert irradiance levels
07
Pipeline Installation
Subsurface pipe laying with IoT sensor nodes every 200 m for real-time flow data
08
Pump Station Setup
Solar-powered pump house with automated pressure control and remote monitoring dashboard
09
Seedling Preparation
Nursery propagation and cold-hardening of 166,857 Ulmus Pumila saplings over two seasons
10
Grid Layout Marking
GPS-guided 2 × 2 m planting grid staking across all three Land Art zones
11
Tree Planting
Hand-planted cohort installation with root hydrogel and windbreak stake support
12
Initial Irrigation
First-season automated watering — 8 L per tree per week for the first 12 weeks
13
IoT Sensor Deploy
Soil moisture, temperature and canopy humidity sensor network activation and calibration
14
Satellite Calibration
Ground-truth field targets placed for NASA MODIS and Sentinel-2 spectral alignment
15
Growth Monitoring
Bi-annual DBH measurement and NDVI/EVI satellite pass analysis reported to dashboard
16
Data Reporting
Martensite Analytica independent audit and carbon stock certification for ESG partners
Satellite Analysis

NASA DATA

Since 2024, tree monitoring conducted via NASA MODIS · Sentinel-5P · Sentinel-2 — independently audited by Martensite Analytica

Corporate Partnership

CORPORATE PACKAGE

One product. One price. Everything included — limited slots each season.

50
TREES IN THE GOBI
Your company's trees — numbered, GPS-mapped, and monitored via NASA satellite every year. Each one tracked for CO₂ absorption and survival rate.
  • ▸GPS coordinates for every tree
  • ▸NASA NDVI satellite monitoring
  • ▸Annual ESG / CO₂ report
  • ▸Site visit to the Gobi (1× / year)
  • ▸Annual photo & story from your trees
5
MERCH ITEMS
Exclusive Shambala × The Mongolz co-branded merchandise for your team — a visible symbol of your commitment to the Gobi restoration mission.
  • ▸Shambala × The Mongolz jersey
  • ▸Co-branded design, team-ready
  • ▸Limited edition collab piece
SHAMBALA × THE MONGOLZ

RESTORATION
